pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page introducing the art education service and linking to key sections. Provides global search, featured content, and quick actions like booking a class, buying a pass, or purchasing a gift card.
primary_functions: Provide quick navigation to Classes, Online Classes, Kids & Teens, Workshops, Passes & Packages, Gift Cards, My Bookings, Wishlist, and Cart
Offer a global search bar to find classes, workshops, and courses by keyword
Highlight featured classes, workshops, online courses, kids classes, and special offers
Surface shortcuts to common tasks such as booking a class, buying a pass, or purchasing a gift card

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit global search form and choose 'View all results'
Click 'Online Classes' quick action
Click 'Buy a Pass' quick action
Click 'Purchase a Gift Card' quick action

access_methods.description: Main entry via 'Home' header link
Users can land here directly via root URL

pages.name: Class Listings
pages.description: Search and filter listings for all individual classes, workshops, online courses, and kids classes. Context is controlled via the categoryId URL parameter (all_classes, online_classes, kids_teens, workshops).
primary_functions: Allow keyword search for classes and workshops (e.g., 'watercolor', 'oil painting course', 'pottery')
Filter by category/context via URL (all_classes, online_classes, kids_teens, workshops)
Filter by level (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)
Filter by audience (Adult, Kids & Teens) and age range (min/max age)
Filter by date range (including presets like Next month) and specific days (weekdays, weekend, Friday, individual weekdays)
Filter by time of day (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, with ranges like 6pm9pm, after 5pm)
Filter by location (online vs in-person, ZIP code entry such as 10001, distance radius like within 10 miles)
Filter by price (set maximum price, including $0 / Free classes) and rating (e.g., 4 stars & up, 4.5 stars & up)
Filter by class type (single class, workshop, multi-week course with 4+ sessions) and labels (Trial, Intro, Free)
Sort results by options such as Soonest date, Best match, Price, and Rating
Display class cards with key details (title, price, main day, schedule, rating, location, tags) and open full details on click
Provide 'Add to Wishlist' from list view for logged-in single user
Provide 'Add to Compare' for workshop listings and show a Compare bar with a 'Compare (2)' button leading to the comparison page

incoming_params.description: Controls listing context; one of 'all_classes', 'online_classes', 'kids_teens', 'workshops'. Passed from header navigation and homepage quick links.
Initial keyword search term (e.g., 'watercolor', 'oil painting course', 'pottery') passed from the homepage search or preserved when refining search.
Selected level filter such as 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced'.
Audience filter such as 'adult' or 'kids_teens'.
Minimum age filter for Kids & Teens context (e.g., 8).
Maximum age filter for Kids & Teens context (e.g., 12).
Date range preset such as 'next_month' or a custom encoded range (e.g., '2026-04-01_to_2026-04-30').
Day-of-week filter such as 'weekend', 'weekdays', 'friday', or a specific weekday.
Time of day filter such as 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening', or specific ranges like 'evening_6_9pm'.
ZIP code used for in-person distance filters (e.g., '10001').
Maximum distance in miles from the supplied locationZip (e.g., 10).
Maximum price filter in USD (e.g., 60, 200, 40, or 0 for free).
Minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4.0, 4.5).
Class type filter such as 'single_class', 'workshop', or 'multi_week_course'.
Comma-separated label filters like 'trial,intro,free'.
Sort selection such as 'soonest_date', 'best_match', 'price_low_high', 'rating_high_low'.
Current results page number for pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a class/workshop/course card in the results list
Click the 'Compare (2)' button in the compare bar after selecting two workshops
Click the 'Wishlist' icon in the header

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Classes', 'Online Classes', 'Kids & Teens', or 'Workshops' header links with appropriate categoryId
Listing context and filters controlled via URL query parameters like categoryId, query, and dateRange

pages.name: Class Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific class, workshop, online course, or kids class. Supports selecting a specific date/session, participants, and optional add-ons before proceeding to booking summary.
primary_functions: Display full class information including title, description, level, audience, age range, price, rating, schedule, duration, main meeting weekday, and location
Indicate whether the offering is a single workshop, ongoing class, or multi-week course (e.g., 4-week online oil painting course)
Show an availability calendar and date picker to choose a specific date or course start date (including weekend, Friday, next month, and evening options)
Allow user to select time slot when multiple times are available for a given date
Allow user to set number of participants for bookings (e.g., 1 or 2 people)
Provide specific booking actions such as 'Book Now', 'Book Course', 'Book Workshop', or 'Enroll for Free' depending on class type and price
Provide an add-ons section (e.g., 'Oil painting materials kit') where the user can select optional extras
Provide an 'Add to Wishlist' button to save the class to the users wishlist
Provide an 'Add to Compare' option for workshops to include this class in the comparison view
On booking/enrollment action, pass selected date, time, participants, and add-ons to the Booking Summary page for confirmation

incoming_params.description: ClassOffering ID of the selected class, workshop, or course to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary booking CTA such as 'Book Now', 'Book Workshop', 'Book Course', or 'Enroll for Free' after choosing date/time and add-ons
Click 'Add to Compare' for a workshop and then click the compare bar button
Click 'Wishlist' icon in the header after adding this class to wishlist

access_methods.description: Accessed via classOffering ID in the 'id' query parameter (e.g., class_detail.html?id=abc123)

pages.name: Booking Summary / Enrollment
pages.description: Confirmation page for individual class, workshop, course bookings, and free enrollments. It summarizes the users selections and collects attendee details and payment choice prior to creating a booking.
primary_functions: Summarize booking details for the selected class, workshop, or course including date, time, participants, and chosen add-ons
Display pricing breakdown (base price, add-ons, total) and clearly show $0 total for free trials or intro classes
Allow user to adjust participant count or return to class detail to change date/time before finalizing
Collect essential attendee information such as name and email for enrollments (e.g., 'Jamie Taylor', 'jamie@example.com')
Offer appropriate payment options for bookings such as 'Pay at Studio', 'Pay at First Session', or 'Pay Now' when applicable
Allow user to finalize the booking or enrollment with a clear action button such as 'Confirm Booking', 'Confirm Workshop Booking', or 'Confirm Enrollment'
Display booking confirmation details and a confirmation message after successful submission

incoming_params.description: ID of the class offering being booked or enrolled in.
Selected ClassSession ID for single classes, workshops, or trial sessions. Optional if booking a course instance.
Selected CourseInstance ID for multi-week courses (e.g., 4-week online oil painting). Optional if booking a single session.
Number of participants in this booking (e.g., 1 or 2).
Encoded list of selected add-ons and quantities (e.g., 'addonId1:1,addonId2:2'). Decoded into selectedAddons for getBookingSummaryForSelection.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Change date/time' link to modify the selected schedule before confirming
Click 'View My Bookings' link after successful confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed after selecting a date/time and participants on Class Detail, via query parameters such as classOfferingId and classSessionId
Final booking/enrollment is created after user submits attendee details and payment choice

pages.name: Passes & Packages
pages.description: Listing page for multi-class passes and packages (e.g., 3-class drawing pass). Users can search and filter passes before viewing details or purchasing via checkout.
primary_functions: Display available passes and packages for different art disciplines (e.g., Drawing, Painting, Pottery)
Provide a search bar for finding specific passes or packages by keyword
Filter passes by category (e.g., drawing) and delivery mode (in-person vs online)
Filter by time of day restrictions (e.g., Morning before 12pm, Afternoon, Evening) for when included classes can be used
Filter by price range to set a maximum pass price (e.g., under $100)
Filter by number of included classes or sessions (e.g., exactly 3 classes)
Show summary cards for each pass including number of classes, price, and usage conditions
Allow users to click a pass to open the Pass / Package Detail page for full information and purchase

incoming_params.description: Optional keyword used to search pass products (e.g., 'drawing', '3-class pass').
Optional Category ID filter (e.g., the Drawing category) when deep-linking into a specific discipline.
Filter for pass location usage such as 'in_person' or 'online'.
Filter for passes limited to certain times of day (e.g., 'morning').
Filter for passes that include a specific number of classes (e.g., 3).
Maximum pass price in USD (e.g., 100).
Sort option for passes such as 'price_low_high' or 'best_value'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a pass/package card to see full details

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Passes & Packages' header link
Accessed via the 'Passes & Packages' footer link

pages.name: Pass / Package Detail
pages.description: Detailed information and purchase options for a specific pass or package. From here the user chooses pass start date and proceeds to checkout with optional promo codes.
primary_functions: Display complete pass/package details including number of included classes (e.g., exactly 3), price, eligible class types, and time-of-day limits (e.g., morning sessions)
Show any terms or restrictions such as validity period or eligible locations (in-person vs online)
Provide a date picker for the user to choose a start date for pass activation (e.g., within the next 30 days)
Allow user to set quantity of passes, defaulting to a quantity of 1
Provide a 'Buy Package' button that initiates purchase
On purchase action, send the user and the selected start date/quantity to the Checkout page for payment and promo code application

incoming_params.description: PassProduct ID for the selected pass or package.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Buy Package' button after selecting quantity and start date

access_methods.description: Accessed via passProduct ID in the 'id' query parameter

pages.name: Gift Cards
pages.description: Page for configuring and purchasing gift cards for art classes. Supports fixed and custom amounts, multiple delivery methods, and personalization before adding to cart.
primary_functions: Present gift card options including fixed amounts and a 'Custom Amount' option
Allow user to enter a custom gift card value (e.g., 75 for a $75 card)
Allow user to choose a delivery method such as 'Printable voucher', email, or postal delivery, with support specifically for printable vouchers
Collect recipient details including recipient name and optional personal message
Display a summary of the configured gift card before adding to cart
Provide an 'Add to Cart' button to add the configured gift card to the shopping cart

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to Cart' then use header cart icon or on-page link to open the cart
Optionally click a 'Checkout now' shortcut that navigates straight to checkout for the current cart

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Gift Cards' header link
Accessed via 'Gift Cards' footer link

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart for non-booking purchases such as gift cards and passes. Users can review, update, or remove items before proceeding to checkout.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the cart including gift cards and passes with their configurations and prices
Allow users to review item details such as amount, delivery method, and quantity
Provide controls to update quantities or remove items from the cart
Show a subtotal and estimated total for the cart contents
Provide a 'Checkout' button to proceed to the Checkout page for payment and order completion

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Checkout' button in the cart
Click 'Continue shopping' link for gift cards
Click 'Continue shopping' link for passes & packages

access_methods.description: Accessed via cart icon/link in the site header

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout page for completing purchases of gift cards and passes/packages. Supports both cart-based orders and direct pass purchases, promo code application, and payment method selection.
primary_functions: Summarize order details for all items being purchased, including gift cards and passes, whether coming directly from a detail page or from the cart
Allow entry of buyer information such as full name (e.g., 'Buyer Name') and contact details
Provide a promo code field where users can enter codes such as 'SAVE15' and apply them to adjust pricing
Recalculate and display total price after any promo code is applied
Offer payment options such as 'Pay in Full Now', 'Pay at Studio', or 'Pay Later' according to site policy
Provide a clear final action button such as 'Complete Purchase' or 'Place Order' to submit the order
Show order confirmation information after a successful purchase

incoming_params.description: Determines checkout mode: 'cart' for cart-based purchases, or 'pass' for a direct pass purchase from Pass Detail.
ID of the pass being purchased directly when orderType='pass'.
Quantity of passes being purchased directly when orderType='pass'.
Selected start date for the pass being purchased directly when orderType='pass' (ISO date string).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View my passes & bookings' link on confirmation when a pass purchase is completed
Click 'Return to Home' after order confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed from Cart (orderType=cart) or from Pass Detail (orderType=pass with passProductId, quantity, startDate)
Order is finalized when buyer information, optional promo code, and payment method are submitted

pages.name: Wishlist
pages.description: Page showing the users saved classes and workshops for future consideration. Supports reviewing weekdays and navigating to class details for booking.
primary_functions: List all classes and workshops that the user has added to their wishlist, including key details like title, price, main meeting weekday, and category
Allow the user to verify they have classes on different weekdays (e.g., three kids classes with three different weekdays)
Provide links from wishlist items to the corresponding Class Detail pages for more information or booking
Allow removal of classes from the wishlist
Provide options to sort or group wishlist items (e.g., by weekday, price, or category) to help comparison

incoming_params.description: Optional sort preference such as 'weekday', 'price_low_high', or 'category'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a wishlist item title or card
Click 'Find more Kids & Teens classes' helper link

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Wishlist' header link/icon

pages.name: My Bookings
pages.description: Dashboard listing the users upcoming and past bookings for classes, workshops, and courses. Acts as the central hub for managing and rescheduling bookings.
primary_functions: List all upcoming bookings including class name, date, time, location, and booking status
Highlight bookings occurring soon (e.g., within the next 7 days) to help users identify classes they may wish to reschedule
Provide access to past bookings for reference
Allow filtering or sorting bookings by date, status, and type (class, workshop, course, pass usage)
Provide links from each booking entry to the Booking Detail page for more detailed information and actions
Serve as a central hub the user can return to after rescheduling or updating bookings

incoming_params.description: Filter for bookings such as 'upcoming', 'past', or 'all'.
Sort preference such as 'date_asc' or 'date_desc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an upcoming booking row to view details or reschedule
Click 'Book another class' shortcut

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'My Bookings' header link

pages.name: Booking Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific booking, with options to view and modify it (e.g., reschedule). Shows booking status, payment method, and reschedule eligibility.
primary_functions: Display full details of a specific booking including class/course/workshop name, date, time, participants, location, and payment method
Indicate how far away the booking date is (e.g., within 7 days, more than 14 days) to help with rescheduling decisions
Provide a 'Reschedule' button when the booking is eligible for rescheduling
Show a rescheduling calendar allowing the user to pick a new date at least 14 days after the original booking date while keeping the same time slot if available
Validate the rescheduled date against business rules (e.g., minimum 14-day change window) and show appropriate messages
Provide a confirmation action such as 'Update Booking' or 'Save Changes' to finalize the new date/time
Offer navigation back to the My Bookings page via breadcrumb or direct link

incoming_params.description: ID of the booking to display and manage.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to My Bookings' after viewing or rescheduling

access_methods.description: Accessed from My Bookings via bookingId query parameter

pages.name: Compare Workshops
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison view for selected workshops (e.g., two pottery workshops). Helps users identify the cheaper or more suitable option before booking.
primary_functions: Display up to two or more selected workshops side-by-side for comparison, focusing on key attributes
Show relevant comparison details such as total price, duration, date options, time of day (e.g., Friday evenings), level, and location
Highlight price differences so the user can quickly identify the cheaper option
Provide clear links or clickable titles to open each compared workshops Class Detail page
Allow the user to remove a workshop from comparison and return to the workshop listings

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a workshop title in the comparison table
Click 'Back to all workshops' link

access_methods.description: Accessed from the compare bar on Class Listings after two workshops are added to comparison

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the art education service, mission, and instructors. Supports trust-building by describing teaching philosophy, safety, and studio locations.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose, mission, and background of the art education service
Introduce instructors, staff, and studio locations with brief profiles or summaries
Build trust by describing teaching philosophy, safety policies, and quality standards

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Browse all classes' call-to-action

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'About' footer link

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and inquiry form for the art education service. Allows users to submit questions or special requests such as group events.
primary_functions: Display contact details including email address, phone number, and studio address
Provide a contact form for general questions about classes, bookings, passes, or gift cards
Allow users to submit specific requests such as group bookings or special events
Offer information about response times and customer support hours

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Contact' footer link
Contact form submission handled via submitContactRequest without leaving the page

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about classes, bookings, payments, and policies. Organized into categories such as booking, passes, gift cards, and promo codes.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about how to book, reschedule, or cancel classes and workshops
Provide information on pricing, passes, gift cards, and promo codes
Explain policies for no-shows, late arrivals, and refunds
Clarify how online classes work and what technical requirements are needed

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'FAQ' footer link

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website, bookings, and purchases.
primary_functions: Outline terms and conditions for using the site and services
Describe booking, cancellation, and refund policies in legal detail
Specify user responsibilities and limitations of liability

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Terms & Conditions' footer link

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Policy describing how user data is collected, used, and protected.
primary_functions: Explain what personal data is collected during browsing, booking, and purchasing
Describe how data is stored, used, and shared with third parties
Explain user rights regarding data access, correction, and deletion
Provide contact details for privacy-related inquiries

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Privacy Policy' footer link

header_links.description: Homepage and main entry point to all sections
All in-person and online adult classes with full search and filters
Online-only classes and multi-week courses, including evening options
Classes designed for children and teens, with age filters
Short-format workshops such as pottery and weekend sessions
Multi-class passes and packages such as 3-class drawing passes
Purchase gift cards, including printable vouchers
View and manage upcoming and past class bookings
View saved classes and workshops the user has wishlisted
View and edit items added for purchase such as passes and gift cards

footer_links.description: Learn more about the art education service and instructors
Frequently asked questions about classes, bookings, and policies
Legal terms for using the site and booking services
Information on how user data is collected and protected
Purchase gift cards for art classes
Browse and buy class passes and packages
Browse all available classes and workshops
